title: senecio scapiodes
intro: Senecio scapiodes, a type of flowering plant in the daisy family, is native to Africa. This plant contains senecionine, a pyrrolizidine alkaloid with potential medicinal properties. The alkaloids in Senecio scapiodes have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Senecio scapiodes is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, although its use should be cautious due to potential toxicity.
